# BP-70 positive: the error is logged, but execution continues past the error branch.
lang: go
file: BP-70-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "log"

func loadConfig() []byte {
	data, err := readConfig()
	if err != nil {
		log.Printf("read config failed: %v", err)
	}
	return data
}

func readConfig() ([]byte, error) { return nil, nil }
